markets.question: Spread: Queens Park Rangers FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Queens Park Rangers FC" if Queens Park Rangers FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Watford FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Queens Park Rangers FC vs. Watford FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Game Handicap: WE (-1.5) vs TOP Esports Armor (+1.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between TOP Esports Armor and Team WE in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE wins 2 or more games than TOP Esports Armor in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "TOP Esports Armor". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

This market will resolve to "AG Super Play" if AG Super Play win the match against Douyu Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Douyu Gaming" if Douyu Gaming win the match against AG Super Play.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Spread: Sheffield United FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Sheffield United FC" if Sheffield United FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Swansea City AFC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between AG Super Play and Douyu Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group S, initially scheduled for March 12 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "AG Super Play" if AG Super Play wins 2 or more games than Douyu Gaming in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Douyu Gaming". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Sheffield United FC vs. Swansea City AFC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Sheffield United FC and Swansea City AFC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
